name: MITRE.LIN.T1212.RULE Exploitation for Credential Access
notes:
No action required
Get more Linux MITRE rules: https://www.scnsoft.com/services/security/siem/linux-mitre-attack-rules
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:MITRE.LIN.T1212: Exploitation for Credential Access
when the source is vulnerable to any exploit on any port
TD_list: APPLY MITRE.LIN.T1212.RULE Exploitation for Credential Access on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:MITRE.LIN.T1212: Exploitation for Credential Access
AND when the source is vulnerable to any exploit on any port
RED_list: Event name: MITRE.LIN.T1212.RULE Exploitation for Credential Access

Event description: Credentialing and authentication mechanisms may be targeted for exploitation by adversaries as a means to gain access to useful credentials or circumvent the process to gain access to systems.
See more on: https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1212
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
Include detected events by "Source IP" from this point forward, in the offense, for 0 second(s)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
